scripts.install:all: npm i --prefix remote-react && npm i --prefix remote-vue && npm i --prefix host
scripts.start: concurrently --names "REACT,VUE,HOST" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,magenta" "npm start --prefix remote-react" "npm start --prefix remote-vue" "npm start --prefix host"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix remote-react && npm run build --prefix remote-vue && npm run build --prefix host
